name_cn:
Chanel 24B 22Bag Mid-size Print Bag Available
22bag has been out for many seasons, every print pattern is beautiful, but this time it really hit me!🧐Floral embroidered CHANEL LOGO, full of vintage vibes. The hardware is silver, which will definitely look cool with jeans!
(39*42*8cm)
(AS3261)
